Intermittent outages impact X users on social media site, previously known as Twitter, on Monday.
news.summary: On Monday, the social media site that was previously known as Twitter experienced multiple reported outages.

BMRT revealed a breakthrough in DNA signature detection using Quantum Physics Tech, impacting law enforcement, medical, and military applications.
news.summary: A game-changing company in quantum physics-driven technology, Base Molecular Resonance™ Technologies (BMRT), situated in Stuart, Florida, revealed a major breakthrough on March 10, 2025. This innovative company is making strides in transforming law enforcement, medical, and military sectors with cutting-edge solutions. The development is expected to have a significant impact on these industries, with potential applications in a wide range of areas.

news.headline: Pure Lithium Corporation receives funding from US Department of Energy’s Vehicle Technology Office and Argonne National Laboratory to scale production of lithium metal anodes from recycled lithium metal waste.
news.summary: In Boston, Pure Lithium Corporation, a revolutionary lithium metal battery technology firm, has received funding from the Vehicle Technology Office to expand the production of lithium metal anodes from recycled sources. In collaboration with Argonne National Laboratory, the company aims to scale up the use of lithium metal waste generated by some US industrial processes. This initiative, if successful, could significantly contribute to reducing environmental impact and bolster Pure Lithium's battery capabilities.

news.headline: Flagship Pioneering launches Lila Sciences to advance science with AI, raising $200M for AI Science Factories.
news.summary: A research company in Cambridge, Massachusetts has utilized an AI platform in conjunction with autonomous labs to enhance scientific discoveries in various fields. With a remarkable $200 million raised in seed funding, the company aims to expand its platform and establish the initial AI Science Factories. This initiative is expected to revolutionize the pace and efficiency of scientific advancements, propelling innovation across multiple scientific domains.

news.headline: Polaris promotes Matt Winings to Senior VP and General Counsel, reporting to CEO Mike; NYSE: PII.
news.summary: In Minneapolis on March 10, 2025, Polaris Inc. revealed the promotion of Matt Winings to senior vice president, general counsel, and corporate secretary. Winings, now a part of the Company's executive leadership team, will be reporting directly to Polaris CEO Mike. The announcement comes as Polaris continues its growth trajectory, with its stock listed on the NYSE under the symbol PII.

news.headline: Horizon Recovery invests $3 million in critical teen mental health services, opening sixth Arizona facility in Peoria amid the state's mental health crisis.
news.summary: In response to Arizona's mental health crisis, a new residential center in Peoria is now offering expanded access to vital care. Horizon Recovery, a leading provider of mental health and addiction services for adolescents in Arizona, recently launched this initiative on March 10, 2025. This center aims to provide life-saving support to those in need within the community and beyond.

news.headline: Global low carbon building market to reach $1.3 trillion by 2033, growing at 9.1% CAGR, due to focus on reducing emissions and sustainability in construction.
news.summary: The increasing focus on reducing carbon emissions and promoting sustainability worldwide is fueling the growth of the low carbon building sector. Strict government regulations emphasizing energy efficiency standards and green building certifications are pushing developers to adopt eco-friendly practices. As a result, the market for low carbon buildings is expanding rapidly, with a projected growth rate of X% in the next five years. This trend is driven by the need to address climate change and achieve environmental targets.

news.headline: Improved sunscreen developed for sunburn-prone horses by InventHelp inventors from Calif., MY BOOJEE PONY MINERAL.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 10, 2025, a new sunscreen/sunblock formulation was introduced for horses with light-colored and sunburn-prone skin. The product, called MY BOOJEE PONY MINERAL, was created by two inventors from Lakeside, California. They aimed to provide a more convenient option for horse owners to protect their animals from the sun.

Gan & Lee Pharmaceuticals starts Phase 2 trial of GZR18 injection for overweight/obesity in US, 1st participant dosed.
news.summary: In a recent press release on March 10, 2025, Gan & Lee Pharmaceuticals (traded as Gan & Lee on the Shanghai Stock Exchange under: 603087) disclosed the initiation of a Phase 2 clinical trial for their bofanglutide injection (research code: GZR18). The announcement highlighted the successful dosing of the initial participant in the trial. This bi-weekly injection aims to address specific medical needs and marks a significant step forward in the pharmaceutical company's research and development efforts.

news.headline: JETSET Pilates hits 100 locations sold, setting stage for rapid expansion. Leader in boutique fitness.
news.summary: A well-known Pilates franchise has reached a significant milestone, solidifying its status as a top player in the boutique fitness industry. On March 10, 2025, JETSET Pilates marked a remarkable achievement in Miami. This modern Reformer Pilates brand offers a unique blend of music and fitness for a rejuvenating experience. With its innovative approach, JETSET Pilates continues to stand out in the market, showcasing its leadership in the industry.

news.headline: Ontario Premier: If the US escalates, I will not hesitate to shut the electricity off completely.
Dow Jones drops 500 points due to Trump's recession comments; Apple, Nvidia, Tesla shares fall.
news.summary: On Monday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average plummeted by 500 points following President Trump's statement wherein he avoided ruling out the possibility of a recession. This led to significant sell-offs in prominent companies like Apple, Nvidia, and Tesla. The stock market experienced a sharp decline due to these events.

news.headline: Dow Jones dives after Trump mentions recession, tariffs; Palantir nears 37% decline, Tesla also drops.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones experienced a significant drop on the stock market following remarks made by President Donald Trump concerning recession and tariffs. Tesla and Palantir were particularly affected, with both companies witnessing a notable decline. Palantir neared a 37% decrease amidst the market turmoil. The live coverage of this event was detailed by Investor’s Business Daily.

news.headline: Parasoft announces support for new MISRA C:2025 standard in C/C++test 2025.1 update, enhancing safety-critical software development.
news.summary: A leading automated software testing company has announced full support for the latest MISRA standard with the upcoming release of C/C++test 2025.1, scheduled for May 2025. Drawing on years of experience in meeting standards requirements, the company aims to enhance functional safety and decrease expenses, intricacy, and dangers. This update reflects the commitment of Parasoft C/C++test to staying at the forefront of industry standards.

news.headline: US Secretary of State Rubio: There will at some point, be an effort to engage with Russia and establish a process to determine their positions, see how far apart we are.
US Secretary of State Rubio: We have to understand the Ukrainian position and have a general idea of what concessions they would be willing to make.
Montero: Peru delegation is in the US to discuss copper tariffs.
Ontario: We have imposed a 25% surcharge on electricity exports to New York, Michigan and Minnesota.
The Fresh Market opens new Spirits & Wine store in Ponte Vedra Beach, providing premium experience. First-ever store opened March 7.
news.summary: A new Spirits & Wine store has been launched by The Fresh Market in Ponte Vedra Beach, providing customers with a premium experience. The premium grocer inaugurated the store on March 7th, marking its first venture into this market segment. This debut signifies the company's commitment to expanding its offerings and catering to a wider clientele. The new store aims to provide a unique shopping experience for customers looking for high-quality spirits and wines. This expansion showcases The Fresh Market's dedication to innovation and customer satisfaction.

news.headline: Global wind turbine decommissioning market set to exceed US$6.1 billion by 2034 with a 21.0% CAGR, driven by recycling and repowering initiatives. Over 34,000 wind turbines in Europe need decommissioning by 2030. Approx 8,000 aging turbines in the U.S. are being replaced through repowering initiatives. Fiberglass waste from turbine blades expected to exceed 2.5 million tons globally by 2050. Major players include Vattenfall AB, GE Renewable Energy, Siemens Gamesa Renewable Energy. Recent innovations like DecomBlades aim to standardize blade design for easier recycling.
news.summary: The global wind turbine decommissioning market is experiencing rapid growth, valued at US$ 796.3 million in 2023 with a projected CAGR of 21.0% from 2024 to 2034. By 2034, the market is expected to exceed US$ 6.1 billion due to aging wind farms and advancements in recycling technologies. Over 34,000 wind turbines in Europe will need decommissioning by 2030, while the U.S. has over 8,000 aging turbines. Fiberglass waste from blades is estimated to exceed 2.5 million tons globally by 2050. Key players include Vattenfall AB, GE Renewable Energy, Siemens Gamesa Renewable Energy, Senvion, Orsted A/S, and Enercon GmbH. Recent developments include projects like DecomBlades focusing on easier blade recycling and initiatives like Endiprev offering comprehensive electrical solutions.

news.headline: Ontario: Any generator selling electricity to the US must add a 25% surcharge valued at $10 per megawatt-hour.
US Secretary of State Rubio: There are still more details to be worked out on the minerals deal with Ukraine.
EMCOR Services NEMSI recognized by ABC for Hartford 21 project with local EIC and national Pyramid awards.
news.summary: EMCOR Services New England Mechanical (NEMSI) in SOUTH WINDSOR, Conn., was honored with a local Excellence in Construction (EIC) award and a national Pyramid Award by the Associated Builders and Contractors (ABC) for their work on the Hartford 21 project in downtown Hartford, CT. The Pyramid Award was bestowed at the ABC Convention 2025 in Las Vegas, NV. NEMSI's project involved building a cutting-edge central plant for the 34-story Hartford 21 apartment complex, aimed at enhancing efficiency and effectiveness.

news.headline: Kayne Anderson Rudnick appoints Stephanie Luh as institutional client relationship manager to strengthen partnerships.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Kayne Anderson Rudnick (KAR) revealed that Stephanie Luh has joined them as an institutional client relationship manager. Luh will be reporting to Jason Pomatto, the managing director and senior client portfolio manager at the firm. This move signifies a strategic addition to KAR's team, showcasing their commitment to enhancing client services.

news.headline: Trip.com Group forms partnerships at ITB Berlin to boost tourism in Europe, Middle East, Asia-Pacific. Key date: March 10, 2025.
news.summary: Strategic partnerships have been formed to enhance tourism in Europe, the Middle East, and Asia-Pacific regions through focused collaborations and campaigns. In an announcement at ITB Berlin 2025, Trip.com Group disclosed a set of alliances aimed at expanding its reach. These partnerships are anticipated to boost tourism numbers in these markets significantly.

news.headline: US Secretary of State Rubio: I hope meeting with Ukrainians on Tuesday will go well.

Bitcoin approaches $78K lows amid US stock downturns at Wall Street open. BTC/USD falls 4% to $79,170 on Bitstamp. Crypto market cap sheds $1T in 2 months, as S&P 500 and Nasdaq dip 2% and 3.5%.Concerns rise over Bybit hack impact on market. Trader advises watching RSI for reversal cues. Risk assets vulnerable to tariffs.
news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) saw a drop of around 4% on March 10, hitting $79,170 on Bitstamp, nearing new four-month lows. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite Index also fell by 2% and 3.5% respectively as risk assets faced a flight to safety. The drop was attributed to US government spending cuts by the Department of Government Efficiency impacting economic growth. Crypto markets have lost $1 trillion in market cap over two months, erasing previous gains. Market participants are uncertain about BTC's price action and are looking for reliable reversal cues. The Bybit hack from last month is also influencing market sentiment, leading to sell-offs and concerns over additional pressure. The correlation between BTC and equities is expected to increase until a new narrative emerges in the market.

news.headline: CHOP's researchers Brodeur and Grupp to be honored as AACR Fellows at 2025 Annual Meeting.
news.summary: Renowned cancer researchers Garrett M. Brodeur, MD, and Stephan A. Grupp, MD, PhD, are set to receive recognition at the upcoming AACR's Annual Meeting. The event will take place in Philadelphia on March 10, 2025. Children's Hospital of Philadelphia (CHOP) proudly disclosed this information.

news.headline: Inventor from Sandpoint, Idaho creates SEPTIC TANK WITH WINGS to secure any septic tank.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 10, 2025, an inventor from Sandpoint, Idaho unveiled a groundbreaking product designed to secure septic tanks in place. The innovative SEPTIC TANK WITH WINGS aims to provide a convenient and efficient solution for anchoring or footing septic tanks. The inventor highlighted the product's ability to secure any septic tank in its intended location. This new design boasts unique features that set it apart from traditional methods, promising a more effective and reliable solution. The invention marks a significant advancement in the industry, with potential implications for septic tank installations nationwide.

news.headline: Activist urges Rio Tinto to unify dual-listed structure, citing $5B equity offering dropout. Shareholder holds $300M stake.
news.summary: Palliser Capital, an activist investor, is urging Rio Tinto (NYSE:RIO) to consolidate its dual-listed corporate structure by dropping its London listing and focusing solely on its Australian listing. The hedge fund, with a $300 million stake in Rio Tinto, has highlighted a report by Grant Thornton Australia that points out how the current structure restricts the company's ability to engage in stock-based mergers and acquisitions, complicates equity capital raising, and leads to a disparity in share prices between its UK and Australian listings. Palliser argues that this inefficiency is hindering Rio Tinto from reaching its full potential.

Fed bids for 6-month bills total $684.6 mln
Future Markets Research Report: NOA Lithium set to benefit from lithium supply shortage - has 140,000 hectares in Argentina.
news.summary: A recent report by Future Markets Research has been released on Noa Lithium Brines Inc (TSXV: NOAL). The company operates within the clean energy transition, electric vehicle adoption, and grid-scale energy storage sectors. Noa Lithium holds a strategic portfolio encompassing more than 140,000 hectares across three promising salars in Argentina's Salta Province, establishing it as one of the leading lithium developers. The company's potential is underscored by its recent resource acquisitions.

news.headline: Baker Hughes: The next 6-8 weeks are key for volatile oil price.
Dallas high school senior hosts 3,500-person concert for graduation party through his nonprofit Nightly Charity Events.
news.summary: In Dallas on March 11, 2025, high school senior Thomas Owen is hosting a graduation party unlike any other. Organized by his nonprofit, Nightly Charity Events, the event has grown into a massive concert expected to draw a crowd of 3,500 people. Originally intended as a small gathering of friends, this unique celebration has become a large-scale event with a significant impact.

news.headline: Brother launches Printhead Perks Program offering up to 60% off replacement printheads, maintains warranty coverage.
news.summary: Bridgewater, New Jersey - Brother has announced the expansion of its Printhead Perks Program, offering customers savings of up to 60% on replacement printheads. The program aims to provide cost-effective solutions for industrial printer users while ensuring warranty coverage remains intact.

news.headline: Align Technology has launched Align X-ray Insights, an AI software in EU and UK, enhancing dental services.
news.summary: In ROTKREUZ, Switzerland, Align Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALGN) unveiled Align X-ray Insights in EU nations and the UK. The software is a CADe* system offering computer-aided detection services. Align is a top medical device company, renowned for Invisalign® clear aligners, iTero™ intraoral scanners, and exocad™ CAD/CAM software for digital orthodontics and restorative dentistry. This new launch targets enhancing dental diagnostics and patient care in these regions.

news.headline: Baker Hughes CEO: I don't see Russian gas coming back.
Ori selects Kao Data for UK AI cloud region, first to deploy NVIDIA H200 GPUs, plans for growth.
news.summary: Ori has selected Kao Data's NVIDIA DGX-Ready data center campus in Harlow for its initial AI infrastructure deployment in the UK. Being the first AI cloud provider to do so, Ori is utilizing NVIDIA's newest H200 GPUs and housing them at Kao Data. This decision marks a significant milestone with plans to incorporate further NVIDIA technologies in the future.

news.headline: Global trenette market projected to hit $245.7 million by 2035, growing at 6.3% CAGR from 2024 ($118.2 million).
news.summary: The "trenette market" report by Allied Market Research projects significant growth in the industry, with the market valued at $118.2 million in 2023 and estimated to reach $245.7 million by 2035, showing a CAGR of 6.3% from 2024 to 2035. Factors contributing to this growth include the global appreciation for Italian cuisine, a preference for premium pasta made from high-quality ingredients, and an increase in demand for organic, whole wheat, and gluten-free options. The rise in home cooking trends and emphasis on regional Italian dishes in the foodservice industry have also fueled the demand for trenette, particularly in high-end dining establishments. You can read the full story on Benzinga.com for more details.

news.headline: OnSwitch and Radial Power to develop and finance 100 MW solar projects for corporate clients.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Houston, PRNewswire reported that OnSwitch, Inc. ("OnSwitch"), a prominent force in software-based development of commercial solar projects, revealed a strategic collaboration with Radial Power ("Radial"), a top supplier of on-site power solutions for commercial projects. This partnership signals a new phase in their capabilities to deliver efficient and sustainable energy solutions.

news.headline: Milliman MedInsight launches new Risk Adjustment Platform on March 10, 2025, to improve patient outcomes and plan performance.
news.summary: A cutting-edge Risk Adjustment Platform has been introduced in Seattle on March 10, 2025. The platform, by Milliman MedInsight®, a top healthcare data and analytics provider, promises to significantly enhance patient outcomes, plan performance, and revenue. This comprehensive system aims to improve accuracy and efficiency in risk assessment and is set to have a big impact on healthcare operations. This innovation is expected to revolutionize the industry with its potential benefits for both patients and providers.
